---
name: Feature request
description: Propose a safety, auditability, documentation, or maintenance improvement.
title: "[feature] "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Problem being solved

<!-- Describe the safety, operational, documentation, or maintenance problem. Avoid proprietary entry or exit logic and guaranteed-performance claims. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- Describe the requested behavior in clear English. Include units, currencies, percentages, denominators, time zones, and rounding assumptions where relevant. -->

## Safety impact

<!-- Explain how this supports risk control, conservative failure behavior, auditability, reproducibility, or operator review. -->

## Trading signals or strategy logic

- Does this request involve entry signals, exit signals, position selection, or proprietary strategy logic? <!-- Yes / No -->
- If yes, explain why it belongs in this safety-focused repository without disclosing private strategy rules.

## Verification expectations

<!-- Describe expected verification, such as MetaEditor compilation, MT5 runtime diagnostics, synthetic test cases, documentation review, or checklist review. -->

## Documentation expectations

<!-- Identify README, CHANGELOG, ROADMAP, or other documentation updates that should accompany the change. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Add references, examples, or constraints that help maintainers evaluate the request. Do not include account identifiers, credentials, private trading logs, or secrets. -->
